resources.title: 웹 검색 ReAct 에이전트 만들기
resources.description: LangChain + Claude로 DuckDuckGo 검색 도구를 활용하는 ReAct 패턴 에이전트 구현
resources.command: pip install langchain langchain-anthropic duckduckgo-search && python -c 'from langchain.agents import create_react_agent ...'

resources.title: CrewAI 리서치-작가 팀 구성
resources.description: 리서처 에이전트가 정보를 수집하고 작가 에이전트가 블로그를 작성하는 2인 크루 구성 실습
resources.command: pip install crewai && python -c 'from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew ...'

quiz.question: What is the primary purpose of using LangChain in AI agent development?
options: To implement ReAct and Plan-and-Execute agent patterns
To create a user interface for agents
To analyze user data for marketing purposes
quiz.explanation: LangChain is specifically used to implement ReAct and Plan-and-Execute agent patterns in AI development.

quiz.question: Which framework is designed for multi-agent collaboration?
quiz.explanation: CrewAI is the framework specifically designed for facilitating multi-agent collaboration.

quiz.question: What is the function of the LangSmith platform in AI agent development?
options: To deploy agents to production environments
To track, debug, and evaluate agent execution
To provide training data for machine learning models
To generate marketing content for agents
quiz.explanation: LangSmith is used for tracking, debugging, and evaluating the execution of AI agents.

practicePrompts.label: Implement ReAct Agent
practicePrompts.instruction: Create a ReAct agent using LangChain.
practicePrompts.prompt: Design a ReAct agent that can answer trivia questions using LangChain.
practicePrompts.followUp: Try adding a feature for the agent to learn from user feedback.

practicePrompts.label: Multi-Agent Collaboration
practicePrompts.prompt: Build a two-agent crew where one agent gathers data and the other writes a summary.
practicePrompts.followUp: Experiment with adding a third agent for editing the summary.

practicePrompts.label: Search Tool Integration
practicePrompts.prompt: Create a ReAct agent that uses DuckDuckGo to fetch information and provide it to the user.
practicePrompts.followUp: Enhance the agent to filter results based on user preferences.
